description:
Hints:
Black has a 2 point sente move (with 7 points threat) at A. Likewise, white has a 2 point sente at B. In addition, there are gote endgames, ranging from 1 to 10 points.
Given the big gote moves on the board, the sente endgames aren't proper sente moves yet (the opponent will not answer the threat, but pick a bigger gote). Start with the biggest gote endgame (M1), then find the right timing for the sente / reverse sente moves!
